channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Union Government Proposes Increase of Lok Sabha Seats to 850 with Updated Delimitation
item.description: The Union government of India is set to introduce legislation to revise the delimitation of Lok Sabha constituencies, which would raise the total seats in the Lower House from 543 to 850. Of these, 81...

item.title: Jaishankar holds discussion with Israeli FM on West Asia developments
item.description: External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar of India held a telephonic discussion with Israeli Foreign Minister Gideon Sa'ar on Tuesday. According to Jaishankar, the conversation covered multiple aspects ...

item.title: AFN Names 24 Athletes to Represent Nigeria at 2026 World Athletics Relays in Gaborone
item.description: The Athletics Federation of Nigeria don select 24 top athletes wey go represent Naija for six relay races during the 2026 World Athletics Relays wey go hold for Gaborone from 2nd to 3rd May. Di AFN Te...

item.title: JCB heir warns inheritance tax reforms could force UK operations to relocate
item.description: Jo Bamford, heir to the JCB manufacturing empire, has voiced concerns over the UK Government's inheritance tax reforms, suggesting that they could compel the company to move its operations to the Unit...

item.title: Barrister Gohar calls for political truce at home as Pakistan backs peace efforts in US-Iran talks
item.description: PTI Chairman Barrister Gohar Ali Khan has urged the government to seek a political understanding with the opposition, describing it as a “domestic ceasefire” while Pakistan plays a mediation role in e...

item.title: Sydney University pays $142,000 to tutor after wage underpayment
item.description: Sydney University has reimbursed a doctoral student tutor over $142,000 after errors in wage payments were discovered, highlighting a broader issue of unpaid entitlements across the Australian higher ...

item.title: Tanzania expands Samia Scholarship to Master’s level in AI and Data Science training
item.description: Tanzania has taken a new step in strengthening its education and innovation sector by extending the Samia Scholarship programme to Master’s degree level, with a strong focus on science and technology....

item.title: House Committee to Evaluate Witness Credibility in VP Duterte Impeachment Proceedings
item.description: The House of Representatives' justice committee is preparing to question the credibility of Ramil Madriaga, a self-proclaimed bagman, during clarificatory hearings related to the impeachment proceedin...

item.title: Gold Pocket Watch of Titanic Rescuer Set to Auction
item.description: A gold pocket watch that once belonged to John Richardson, an engineer aboard the RMS Carpathia, is expected to sell for up to £100,000 at an upcoming auction in Penshurst. Richardson played a crucial...

item.title: KeNHA Collaborates With Waze to Offer Real-Time Traffic Updates for Kenyan Drivers
item.description: Motorists in Kenya are set to enjoy smoother journeys thanks to a new partnership between the Kenya National Highways Authority (KeNHA) and the navigation app Waze. The collaboration aims to enhance r...

item.title: Supermassive black hole in galaxy J1007+3540 reactivates after 100 million years
item.description: Astronomers have observed a supermassive black hole at the center of galaxy J1007+3540 suddenly reactivating after nearly 100 million years of dormancy. Using advanced radio telescopes, including LOFA...

item.title: Naqvi urges business community to repatriate 20-30% wealth ahead of budget
item.description: Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi, while addressing a ceremony at the Federation House in Karachi, has urged Pakistan’s business community to bring back around 20 to 30 percent of their wealth to the cou...

item.title: US naval blockade of Iranian ports escalates Middle East tensions as Hezbollah rejects Lebanon–Israel negotiations
item.description: The live coverage reports a sharp escalation in the ongoing US–Israel–Iran conflict, with the United States initiating a naval blockade of Iranian ports following the expiry of an ultimatum. The move ...

item.title: Thai Shelter Supports Trafficking Survivors in Rebuilding Their Lives
item.description: CNN’s report highlights the story of Kat, a teenage survivor of human trafficking who found safety and purpose at the Freedom Home operated by The Exodus Road in northern Thailand. After being rescued...

item.title: Ten Years of B.C.’s Toxic Drug Emergency: Examining the Impact on Public Health
item.description: On April 14, 2016, British Columbia became the first Canadian province to declare toxic drugs a public health emergency in response to rising overdose deaths. In the decade since, over 18,000 people h...

item.title: US-Iran Relations Tighten; Focus Shifts to Potential Conflict and Hollywood's Cinematic Portrayals
item.description: Rising tensions between the United States and Iran continue to escalate, prompting concerns about a potential military conflict. Recent developments indicate heightened diplomatic efforts, including t...

item.title: Man hospitalised after being stabbed several times at home
item.description: Early on Tuesday morning, emergency services responded to a serious stabbing at a private residence where a man had been attacked multiple times. The victim, believed to be in his thirties, was found ...

item.title: Police watchdog probes officers' conduct in Wimbledon crash that killed two schoolgirls
item.description: The Independent Office for Police Conduct (IOPC) is investigating complaints against 11 officers regarding their handling of the inquiry into a tragic car crash in Wimbledon that resulted in the death...

item.title: Zanzibar Government Supports Youth Innovation for Digital Economy Growth
item.description: The Zanzibar government is actively promoting youth-led innovation and technology as a key strategy for job creation, digital economic growth, and enhancing global competitiveness. Mr. Mudrik Ramadhan...

item.title: Trump Criticizes Pope Leo XIV on Crime and Nuclear Weapons Stance
item.description: President Donald Trump don yan say e no be fan of Pope Leo XIV after the Pope call for calmness and diplomacy regarding the tension between the United States and Iran over nuclear weapons. Trump tok s...
